text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I'd like to introduce my younger sister for
the day.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's me, Curren! ♪ And today, I'm on a mission to
give Bright the true big sis experience!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee. I've been blessed with a wonderful big
sister by the name of Ryan, yes?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
That's why I'm taking the opportunity to walk in
her cleats and try acting like a wonderful big
sister myself!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
That's where I come in! If anyone likes being
spoiled, it's me, Curren! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I doubt she'd interfere with training... Mejiro
Bright seems completely on board with the idea,
too, so I decide to keep an eye on them from a
distance...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Are you chewing thoroughly? Ryan has always
said efficient nutrient intake is very important.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yep! I'm munching like there's no tomorrow! ♪
Thanks for the tip, Bright!
choice_data_list: (It looks like things are going well.)
(It looks like things are going well.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
When you find yourself with crumbs on your lips, I
shall wipe them off for you, like so.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Splash!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, dear. I knocked over your drink. Did any of it
get on you, Curren?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Nope! Actually... Hehe! You're the one who's all
wet, Big Sis! Here, I'll wipe it off for you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Phew... Always be sure to fix your hair after
training!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
When we were younger, Ardan would brush all of
our hair after we'd been running all day. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh! ♪ Can you brush mine, Big Sis? Please!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: I'll do it just as Ardan did, smoothly and softly...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wow! You're making it look so pretty!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Achoo!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Sis?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Come now, you must sit still, you know.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
No, no... C'mon, Big Sis. You're still all sweaty
from training. You'll catch a cold if you're not
careful.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Stuffy noses are no fun! Let's go get changed first.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Ahh. Right, next time, I'll really be the one doing the
caregiving.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Is there anything you'd like to do, Curren?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I could use a nap, I think? After all that training, I
wanna take a nap with you, Big Sis! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
In that case, I shall sing you a lullaby to lull you
into a deep sleep. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Go to sleeep, go to sleeep... ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Go... Go to, sleeeee... Zzz...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Mejiro Bright keeps trying to assume
the role of big sister, she can't help falling short...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Oh, dear. Time has absolutely flown by. I'd hoped
we would have time for more...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, I thought I could provide for you just as
well as my dear sister Ryan does for me, but...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Look, you're my big sis, Bright! Not Ryan.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
And I had a total blast! ♪ Who knew having such
an adorable big sis looking after me would be so
much fun!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Curren...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Say, um, Bright? Can I keep calling you "Big Sis"?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Hehehe... By all means, please do!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: But I want to do ever so much more caregiving next time! It would only be fitting for a big sister!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright remains determined. On the one
hand, her persistence is impressive, but on the
other, I'm a little concerned...
choice_data_list: You may have a knack for being looked after...
You may have a knack for being looked after...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Bright remains determined. On the one
hand, her persistence is impressive, but on the
other, I'm a little concerned...
choice_data_list: You may have a knack for being looked after...
You may have a knack for being looked after...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Yes! ♪ I shall become the most caring and
dependable big sister ever!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I can't wait. I'm counting on a whooole lot
of TLC! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Every so often after that, I spot the two of them
around the academy together, but it remains hard
to tell who's taking care of who.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I think so too! I learned sooo much from my time
with you today, Big Sis! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Teehee, um... I am honored to receive such a...
compliment?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't look like Mejiro Bright fully
understands what Curren Chan means, but seeing
her so happy warms my heart.
